policy.double_verification_rule: A reference is usable only if (1) its domain is allowed and (2) it is confirmed by a second independent official source or ICAI announcement.

resources.title: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (Official)
resources.purpose: Primary source for notifications, announcements, exam-related circulars, and student updates.

resources.title: ICAI Examination Portal
resources.purpose: Exam forms, admit card/process pages, and exam announcements.

resources.title: ICAI e-Services
resources.purpose: Student login/service workflows and profile-linked services.

resources.title: ICAI Self Service Portal (SSP)
resources.purpose: Student/Member self-service actions and administrative workflows.

resources.title: Board of Studies (BoS) Knowledge Portal
resources.purpose: Study support, lectures, and student learning resources.

resources.title: ICAI Centralized Distribution System (CDS)
resources.purpose: ICAI publications and study material ordering/distribution.

resources.title: ICAI Publication CDN
resources.purpose: Hosts official ICAI PDFs (notifications, modules, publications).

resources.title: Ministry of Corporate Affairs (Government of India)
resources.purpose: Companies Act updates, corporate law notifications, and compliance references.

resources.title: Income Tax Department Portal (Government of India)
resources.purpose: Income-tax updates, circular context, and taxpayer utilities.

resources.title: CBIC (Indirect Tax / GST official)
resources.purpose: GST and indirect tax notifications and circular references.

resources.title: India Code
resources.purpose: Official consolidated acts and statutory text references.

resources.title: e-Gazette (Government Notifications)
resources.purpose: Gazette notifications for legal authenticity checks.

resources.title: SWAYAM
resources.purpose: Open online courses for accounting, commerce, math, and study skills.

resources.title: NPTEL
resources.purpose: Open lecture courses that can supplement CA foundations and discipline-building.
